page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7nex.xlarge is a compute-optimized virtual server instance running on the KVM hypervisor. It is equipped with an Intel Xeon 8369B processor operating at a clock speed of 2.7 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. The hardware configuration delivers 4 dedicated vCPUs and 4 physical cores, paired with 8.0 GB of system memory, resulting in a 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio. This instance does not include local storage or GPU hardware, and it features a baseline network bandwidth of 5 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks indicate average capabilities for single-core operations, with stress-ng single-core CPU performance and single-threaded gzip and bzip3 compression and decompression rates falling into the middle tier. However, multi-core performance and memory bandwidth are relatively weak, as evidenced by lower-tier stress-ng multi-core and multi-threaded bzip3 decompression results. Static web serving throughput remains stable at an average rate of 6.35 GB/sec.

The qualitative cost profile of this instance is shaped by its dedicated CPU allocation, which ensures consistent processing power without resource contention, though it is constrained by a low memory-to-core ratio and the absence of local storage. This makes the server highly efficient for compute-bound tasks that do not demand large memory footprints. Appropriate workloads include static web serving, lightweight application hosting, and single-threaded data processing.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7nex.xlarge is a compute-optimized virtual server powered by a 2.7 GHz Intel Xeon 8369B processor. Built on the x86_64 architecture, it features 4 dedicated vCPUs and 4 physical cores, paired with 8.0 GB of RAM, yielding a 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio. The instance lacks local storage and GPUs, relying on network-attached storage and offering a baseline network bandwidth of 5 Gbps. Benchmark results indicate average single-core CPU performance and single-threaded compression speeds, though multi-core and memory bandwidth metrics fall into the weaker tiers. With its dedicated CPU allocation, this server provides predictable processing power for compute-bound workloads that do not require massive memory footprints. It is best suited for static web serving, lightweight application servers, and single-threaded processing tasks.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7nex.xlarge is a compute-optimized instance featuring 4 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 8.0 GB RAM, and 5 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for predictable CPU-bound workloads.

tagline: A dedicated compute-optimized instance featuring Intel Xeon processors and a balanced 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio for predictable workloads.

8.0 GB of RAM providing a compute-optimized 1:2 resource ratio
